channel.title: Issue 2 — July 2026 on The Community Voice
channel.description: Recent content in Issue 2 — July 2026 on The Community Voice

item.title: School Holiday Guide
item.description:
From library storytime to the new skate park, here’s what’s on for families over the break.

The community centre is also running a free holiday program every weekday morning — bookings are essential and fill up fast.

item.title: Park Upgrade Update
item.description:
Council crews broke ground on the Riverside Park upgrade this week, with a new playground, shaded seating, and a looped walking track expected to open in spring.

The park will remain open throughout construction, though the northern entrance will be closed for safety.
